Other National Fundings

ISTKA (Istanbul Development Agency) Supports

Guided Project Support

Istanbul Development Agency provides support for guided projects with specified issues such as business model, partnership structure, ownership status and project cost in priority areas determined in the Istanbul Regional Plan or as a result of field studies.

For detailed information:

https://www.istka.org.tr/destekler/destek-turleri/

Within the scope of a specific support program conducted by the Agency, potential applicants with clearly defined qualifications are invited to submit project proposals in accordance with predetermined subjects and conditions.

For detailed information:

https://www.istka.org.tr/destekler/destek-turleri/

Feasibility Support

This is a type of direct financial support provided to feasibility studies of projects aimed at benefiting from important opportunities in terms of the development and competitiveness of the region, preventing threats and risks to the regional economy, and developing the innovation and entrepreneurship capacity of the region.

For detailed information:

https://www.istka.org.tr/destekler/destek-turleri/

Ministry Funds

IPA

Instrument for Pre-Accession Assistance (IPA) is the financial assistance provided by the European Union to candidate countries for the purpose of carrying out the legal and administrative reforms required for membership.

Pre-accession financial support will continue within the framework of 5 priority areas in the IPA-III period covering the years 2021-2027. All candidate countries will prepare their projects under the 5 priority areas determined and the projects deemed appropriate by the Commission will be selected within the scope of IPA.

For detailed information:

https://www.ab.gov.tr/ipa-iii-donemi_51805.html

TÜSEB

The Project Management and Support Department (PYDDB) of the Turkish Health Institutes Presidency (TÜSEB) publishes project calls through the TÜSEB Information Management System (TBYS) in order to support projects at various levels from the R&D stage to the production stage for the development, localization and nationalization of medical products and technologies needed by our national health system, especially medicines, vaccines, medical devices, biomaterials and diagnostic kits.

For detailed information:

https://www.tuseb.gov.tr/proje-destek/cagri-programlari/tumu

Consulate Funds

Swedish Consulate General Fund

The Consulate General of Sweden in Istanbul offers funding opportunities to support projects covering all of Turkey by cooperating with civil society organizations and to provide a public discussion area.

For more information, please contact the R&D Resources Directorate.

Netherlands Consulate General Fund

The Embassy and Consulate General of the Kingdom of the Netherlands supports projects in the fields of MATRA (Social Transformation) AND HUMAN RIGHTS (HR).

For more information, please contact the R&D Resources Directorate.
